tools.name: proposal_registry.list
tools.description: List proposal registry entries from the read-only manifest.

tools.name: proposal_registry.show
tools.description: Show one proposal registry entry by proposal_id.

tools.name: proposal_registry.show_payload
tools.description: Show one proposal registry entry with source proposal payload.

tools.name: proposal_review_queue.list
tools.description: List proposals pending human review in the Runes Attunement Queue.

tools.name: proposal_review_queue.show
tools.description: Show one pending-review proposal queue entry.

tools.name: proposal_review_queue.show_payload
tools.description: Show one pending-review proposal with source proposal payload.

tools.name: smoke.proposal_registry_all
tools.description: Run all proposal registry regression smoke checks.

tools.description: Run all proposal review queue regression smoke checks.
